titleStmt.title: SII 17.601: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 601. (A.R. No. 556 of 1904.) TIRUVĀRŪR, NAGAPATTINAM TALUK, TANJORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the first prākāra in the Tyāgarājasvāmin temple.

This inscription commences with the praśasti Pūmādu puṉara, etc., of Vikramachōḷa. The details of date given viz. year 8, Simha ba. 3, Tuesday, Rēvatī correspond to 1125 A.D., August 18, f.d.t. ·09, f.d.n. ·27.

It records the gift of 17 kāśu for a perpetual lamp to god TiruvārUruḍaiyār ŚrImU lasthānam-uḍaiyār by Gaggaicheṭṭi, son of Kudiraicheṭṭi (horse-dealer) Siddha Cheṭṭi, a member of Vīrarājēndradēvamaṅgala-chchāttuThis Śāttu is perhaps a reference to a caravan of horse-dealers belonging to or camping at Vīrarājēndradēvamaṅgalam. cf. MAśāttuvān and Sanskrit sārtha.in Mēlai-Mārāyapāḍi alias Kōyiṟukkuṟu-nāḍu. This amount was received by the representatives of the body called Śivabrāhmaṇar Nāṟpatteṇmar, holding leases of the temple, who agreed to contribute oil, measured by tuḍaiyuḷakku, equivalent to Puṟṟiḍañgoṇḍāṉ nāḻi, out of the interest from the endowed amount.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu nilavat tannirupatu malar maṉṉavarcūṭa manniya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭic ceṅkol cenṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷarppa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan=taḻaippak kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅko ḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭainiḻaṟṟa cempon virasiṁhāsanattu
mukkokkiḻaāṉaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripanmarāna tribhuvanaccakkaravatti kaḷ vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8Āvatu ciṅkaṉāyaṟṟu A[ parapak] kattu tritiyaiyum cevvāykkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa revatināḷ keyamāṇikka vaḷanāṭṭut tiruvārurk kūṟṟattu tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrīmulasthāna muṭaiyār koyil nilanivanta muṭaiya civabrāhmaṇar nāṟpatteṇ
markku camainta civabrāhaṇan kaucikan vitiviṭaṅkan puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭār śrīpātarakṣai yum kavucikan paravaiviracoḻanāṉa tillai nāyakabhaṭṭanum kavucikan Aṇiyan vitiviṭaṅ kanum kāśyapan puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭān paṭṭanum bhāradvāji tūvāyan Ātittanum bhāradva ji tūvāyan tevar kaṇṭanum pārācariyan civajñāna ṛṣabhavāhanabhaṭṭanum cikākkiran mannuvāna puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭānum kāśyapan kūttan ciyārur tevanum bhāradvā
ji Irāman tirumulaṭṭān muṭaiyānum gautavan pūvaṇattaṭikaḷ pantalum kāśyapan nn=ti Oḷivaḷarviḷakkum Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivvaṉaivom melaimārāyarpāṭiyāna koyiṟuk kuṟu nāṭṭu virarājentradeva maṅkalaccāttil Irukkum kutiraic ceṭṭi citta ceṭṭi makan kaṅkai ceṭṭikku nāṅkaḷ Upayat tiṭṭukkuṭutta paricāvatu tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrī mulasthānamuṭaiyārkkut tirunun=tāviḷakku kaṅkai ceṭṭi devarbhaṇṭārattu Oṭukki
na kācu 10 7 Ikkācu patin Eḻum devar śrīpaṇṭārattil niṉṟum nāṅkaḷ kaikkoṇṭu palicaiyāl tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku nāḷ Onṟukkup puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭān nāḻiyāl Okkum tuṭaiyuḻakkāl Eṇṇai Uḻakkāka nāḷ muṉṉūṟṟaṟupattañcukku Eṇṇai toṇṇūṟṟoru nāḻi Uḻakkum Ivvāṇṭu mutal Āṇṭutoṟum Inta Eṇṇai koṇṭu Ittirunutoviḷakku Onṟum nittamum muṭṭāmal Erikkakka
ṭavomāka Ikkācu patineḻum devar śrīpaṇṭārattilninṟuṅ kaikkoṇṭom civabrāhmaṇa rom Ittirununtāviḷakku Erikkumiṭattu can=tirātittavaṟ śāśvavatiyamāka nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ vaṟkattārum Eṅkaḷukku Aṭaippāna nilamum nāṅkaḷ peṟakkaṭava peṟum Uḷḷataṉaiyum nāṅkaḷum Eṅkaḷ vaṟkattārum Eṅkaḷ pakkal vilaikoṇṭārum Ittiru nutoviḷakku Oṉṟum Erikkakkaṭavomāka Ippaṭi sammatittu
kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoḷḷappeṟuvānāka sammatittu Upayattiṭṭukkuṭuttom kutiraiceṭṭi cittaiceṭṭi makan kaṅkaiceṭṭi tiruvāruruṭaiyār śrīmulasthānamuṭaiyār koyilil civabraāhmaṇarnāṟpatteṇmarkku camain=ta Ivvaṉaivom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka Eḻutinen Ikkoyil mutalkaṇakku veṭkovan tiruvāruruṭaiyān(k) kūḷi kaṇavati Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāśyapan neminan=ti Oḷivaḷar viḷakkineḻuttu Itu paravai viracoḻa neḻuttu
Itu mannuvāna puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇṭān sayijñaiyānamaikku koyilkkaṇakku tiruvāruru ṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku gautaman pūvaṇattaṭikaḷ Eḻuttu kaucikan puṟṟiṭaṅkoṇ ṭār śrīpātarakṣai sayijñaiyānamaikku Oḷivaḷar viḷakkineḻuttu Itu kūttan ci yān maikkuttiruvāruruṭaiyāneḻuttu kevucikan Aṇiyanvitiviṭaṅkan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku civajñā nan Iṣabhavāhananbhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Itu Irāman tirumulaṭṭānamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu tūvā yantevar kaṇṭa neḻuttu
Ippaṭi kāśyapan puṟa panmāheśvara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.601 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
